name: ai-speedometer-headless
description: Headless CLI for benchmarking AI models — runs on Node.js and Bun, no TUI dependencies

scripts.build: bun build src/headless-entry.ts --outdir dist --target node --external 'jsonc-parser' && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/headless-entry.js > dist/ai-speedometer-headless && chmod +x dist/ai-speedometer-headless && rm dist/headless-entry.js
